name: validate_closure_packet
description: Validate a machine-checkable closure packet line

packet.description: ClosurePacket line to validate (format: ClosurePacket: RoundID=<id>; ScopeID=<id>; ChecksTotal=<int>; ChecksPassed=<int>; ChecksFailed=<int>; Verdict=<PASS|BLOCK>; [OpenRisks=<text>]; [NextAction=<text>])

require_open_risks_when_block.description: Require non-empty OpenRisks if Verdict=BLOCK (optional, default false)

require_next_action_when_block.description: Require non-empty NextAction if Verdict=BLOCK (optional, default false)

exit_code.description: Exit code (0 for valid, 1 for invalid)
